definition:
1. a putting together, composition , (Aristotle Philosopher); ς. προσώπου a studied expression  of countenance, of Pericles, (Plutarch) 
2. a bringing together, introduction, recommendation , (Polybius Historicus) 
3.  συνίσταμαι); a standing together, meeting : in hostile sense, close combat, conflict , (Herdotus Historicus); metaphorically, ς. γνώμης a conflict  of mind, intense anxiety, (Thucydides) 
4. a meeting, a knot of men , (Euripides); κατὰ ξυστάσεις γιγνόμενοι forming into knots , (Thucydides): a political union , (Demosthenes Orator) 
5. friendship  or alliance , (Polybius Historicus): a conspiracy , (Plutarch) 
6. construction, structure, constitution , (Plato Philosophus): absolute a political constitution , (Plato Philosophus) 
7. metaphorically of the mind, ς. φρενῶν contraction, sternness, sullenness , (Euripides) (ML)
